description: Virat Kohli averages significantly higher while chasing in T20 cricket
source: Career T20 chasing avg 54.2 vs setting avg 34.1 (Cricsheet 2016-2026)

description: Rohit Sharma has a notable weakness against left-arm pace on bouncy pitches
source: Dismissal rate vs left-arm pace: 0.042/ball vs career 0.021/ball (Cricsheet)

description: Andre Russell is extremely dangerous on flat batting pitches in T20s
source: FP avg on batting pitches: 68.2 vs overall avg 48.1 (Cricsheet IPL 2018-2026)

description: Jasprit Bumrah is the most effective death-overs bowler in T20 cricket
source: Death overs economy: 7.1 (best among bowlers with 50+ death overs, Cricsheet 2018-2026)

description: MS Dhoni performs significantly above average in pressure matches and finisher role
source: Knockout FP avg: 42.3 vs regular match avg 28.1 (Cricsheet IPL 2013-2024)

description: Mohammed Shami is highly effective when bowling in first innings in ODIs
source: 1st innings wickets avg: 3.1 vs 2nd innings: 1.9 (Cricsheet ODI 2019-2026)

description: Ben Stokes consistently elevates performance in high-pressure matches
source: Knockout match FP avg: 55.2 vs regular: 39.4 (Cricsheet all formats 2015-2026)

description: David Warner has an exceptional record at Sydney Cricket Ground
source: SCG FP avg: 58.1 vs career avg 41.2 (Cricsheet BBL+T20 2012-2026)
